// ===== FILTER CHIPS =====
function initFilterChips() {
  const container = document.getElementById('filter-chips');
  CATEGORIES.forEach(cat => {
    const chip = document.createElement('button');
    chip.className = 'filter-chip' + (cat.name === activeCategory ? ' active' : '');
    chip.textContent = cat.name.toUpperCase();
    chip.setAttribute('role', 'tab');
    chip.setAttribute('aria-selected', cat.name === activeCategory ? 'true' : 'false');
    chip.setAttribute('aria-label', `Filter by ${cat.name}`);
    chip.id = `chip-${cat.name.replace(/\s+&?\s*/g, '-').toLowerCase()}`;
    chip.style.setProperty('--chip-color', cat.color);
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
      activeCategory = cat.name;
      document.querySelectorAll('.filter-chip').forEach(c => {
        c.classList.remove('active');
        c.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
      });
      chip.classList.add('active');
      chip.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
      renderSkills();
    });
    container.appendChild(chip);
  });
}

// ===== RENDER SKILLS =====
function renderSkills() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('skills-grid');
  let filtered = [...SKILLS_DATA];

  if (activeCategory !== 'All') {
    filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.category === activeCategory);
  }

  if (searchQuery) {
    const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter(s =>
      s.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      s.tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
      s.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      (s.mcpServers && s.mcpServers.some(m => m.toLowerCase().includes(q)))
    );
  }

  filtered = sortSkills(filtered, sortMode);

  document.getElementById('skill-count').textContent = filtered.length;

  // Guard: Flip.getState crashes on empty grids
  const existingCards = grid.querySelectorAll('skill-card');
  let state = null;
  if (existingCards.length > 0) {
    try { state = Flip.getState('.skills-grid skill-card'); } catch(e) { state = null; }
  }

  grid.innerHTML = '';

  if (filtered.length === 0) {
    grid.innerHTML = `
      <div class="no-results">
        <div class="no-results-icon">\u{1F50D}</div>
        <div class="no-results-text">NO SKILLS MATCH YOUR FILTERS</div>
      </div>
    `;
    return;
  }

  filtered.forEach((skill, i) => {
    const card = document.createElement('skill-card');
    card.setAttribute('name', skill.name);
    card.setAttribute('category', skill.category);
    card.setAttribute('description', skill.description);
    card.setAttribute('icon', skill.icon);
    card.setAttribute('invoke', skill.invoke);
    card.setAttribute('tags', skill.tags.join(','));
    card.style.setProperty('--card-accent', skill.accent);
    card.dataset.index = i;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });

  if (state && grid.children.length > 0) {
    Flip.from(state, {
      duration: 0.35,
      ease: 'power2.inOut',
      absolute: true,
      scale: true
    });
  }

  ScrollTrigger.refresh();
}

function sortSkills(skills, mode) {
  const sorted = [...skills];
  switch (mode) {
    case 'alpha':
      sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      break;
    case 'category':
      sorted.sort((a, b) => a.category.localeCompare(b.category) || a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      break;
    case 'recent':
      sorted.reverse();
      break;
  }
  return sorted;
}

// ===== HERO ANIMATIONS — BRUTALIST GSAP =====
function initHeroAnimations() {
  gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

  const tl = gsap.timeline({ defaults: { ease: 'power3.out' } });

  // Badge slam in
  tl.fromTo('#hero-badge',
    { opacity: 0, x: -60, rotation: 15 },
    { opacity: 1, x: 0, rotation: -2, duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(2)' },
    0.2
  );

  // Title: character-by-character reveal with glitch-style stagger
  const titleEl = document.getElementById('hero-title');
  const titleText = titleEl.textContent;
  titleEl.innerHTML = '';
  titleText.split('').forEach((char, i) => {
    const span = document.createElement('span');
    span.className = 'char';
    span.textContent = char === ' ' ? '\u00A0' : char;
    titleEl.appendChild(span);
  });

  tl.fromTo('#hero-title .char',
    { opacity: 0, y: 40, rotationX: -90, scale: 0.5 },
    { opacity: 1, y: 0, rotationX: 0, scale: 1, stagger: 0.03, duration: 0.4, ease: 'back.out(1.7)' },
    0.4
  );

  // Subtitle: typewriter-style slide
  tl.fromTo('#hero-subtitle',
    { opacity: 0, x: -40, clipPath: 'inset(0 100% 0 0)' },
    { opacity: 1, x: 0, clipPath: 'inset(0 0% 0 0)', duration: 0.8, ease: 'power3.out' },
    1.2
  );

  // CTA: slam with rotation
  tl.fromTo('#hero-cta',
    { scale: 0, rotation: -15, opacity: 0 },
    { scale: 1, rotation: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(3)' },
    1.6
  );

  // Hero card: slide up with rotation
  tl.fromTo('#hero-card',
    { opacity: 0, y: 60, rotation: 5 },
    { opacity: 1, y: 0, rotation: -1, duration: 0.7, ease: 'expo.out' },
    1.9
  );

  // Orbit badges — continuous rotation
  const radius = 220;
  ['orbit-1','orbit-2','orbit-3'].forEach((id, i) => {
    const angle = (i * 120 - 90) * Math.PI / 180;
    const x = Math.cos(angle) * radius;
    const y = Math.sin(angle) * radius;
    const badge = document.getElementById(id);
    gsap.set(badge, { x: x, y: y });
  });

  gsap.to('#hero-orbit', { rotation: 360, duration: 25, ease: 'none', repeat: -1 });
  gsap.to('.orbit-badge', { rotation: -360, duration: 25, ease: 'none', repeat: -1 });
}

function initMCPCurator() {

  MCP_STACKS.forEach((stack, index) => {

    card.className = 'mcp-stack-card';
    card.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
    card.setAttribute('aria-label', `${stack.name} — synergy ${stack.synergy}%`);

    const synergyClass = stack.synergy >= 90 ? 'synergy-green' : stack.synergy >= 80 ? 'synergy-yellow' : 'synergy-red';

    card.innerHTML = `
      <svg class="mcp-stack-expand-indicator" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>
      <div class="mcp-stack-header">
        <span class="mcp-stack-emoji">${stack.emoji}</span>
        <div class="mcp-stack-info">
          <div class="mcp-stack-name">${stack.name}</div>
          <div class="mcp-stack-desc">${stack.description}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mcp-stack-badges">
        ${stack.servers.map(s => `<span class="mcp-server-badge">${s}</span>`).join('')}
      </div>
      <div class="mcp-synergy-bar">
        <div class="mcp-synergy-fill ${synergyClass}" style="width: ${stack.synergy}%"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mcp-synergy-label">SYNERGY: ${stack.synergy}%</div>
      <div class="mcp-stack-details">
        <div class="mcp-stack-detail-item"><strong>USE CASE:</strong> ${stack.useCase}</div>
        <div class="mcp-stack-detail-item"><strong>SYNERGY REASON:</strong> ${stack.synergyReason}</div>
        ${stack.warnings.map(w => `<div class="mcp-stack-detail-item warning"><strong>WARNING:</strong> ${w}</div>`).join('')}
        <div class="mcp-stack-detail-item"><strong>PAIRED SKILLS:</strong> ${stack.pairedSkills.join(', ')}</div>
      </div>
    `;

    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      card.classList.toggle('expanded');
      const details = card.querySelector('.mcp-stack-details');
      if (card.classList.contains('expanded')) {
        gsap.to(details, { maxHeight: 500, opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, ease: 'expo.out' });
      } else {
        gsap.to(details, { maxHeight: 0, opacity: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'expo.in' });
      }
    });

    card.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
        e.preventDefault();
        card.click();
      }
    });

    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ===== BUILD YOUR OWN STACK =====
function initBuildYourOwn() {
  const select = document.getElementById('mcp-build-select');
  const addBtn = document.getElementById('mcp-build-add-btn');
  const selectedContainer = document.getElementById('mcp-build-selected');
  const resultEl = document.getElementById('mcp-build-result');
  const synergyContainer = document.getElementById('mcp-build-synergy');
  const synergyFill = document.getElementById('mcp-build-synergy-fill');
  const synergyLabel = document.getElementById('mcp-build-synergy-label');

  // Populate select
  ALL_MCP_SERVERS.forEach(server => {
    const option = document.createElement('option');
    option.value = server;
    option.textContent = server.toUpperCase();
    select.appendChild(option);
  });

  addBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const val = select.value;
    if (!val || buildStack.length >= 4) return;
    if (buildStack.includes(val)) return;
    buildStack.push(val);
    select.value = '';
    updateBuildUI();
  });

  select.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      addBtn.click();
    }
  });

  function updateBuildUI() {
    selectedContainer.innerHTML = '';
    buildStack.forEach((server, i) => {
      const chip = document.createElement('span');
      chip.className = 'mcp-build-chip';
      chip.textContent = server;
      chip.title = 'Click to remove';
      chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
        buildStack.splice(i, 1);
        updateBuildUI();
      });
      selectedContainer.appendChild(chip);
    });

    if (buildStack.length === 0) {
      resultEl.textContent = 'Select up to 4 MCP servers to calculate synergy score.';
      synergyContainer.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }

    const synergy = calculateSynergy(buildStack);
    const synergyClass = synergy >= 90 ? 'synergy-green' : synergy >= 80 ? 'synergy-yellow' : 'synergy-red';

    resultEl.innerHTML = `<strong>${buildStack.length}</strong> server${buildStack.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} selected  |  Synergy Score: <strong>${synergy}%</strong>`;

    synergyContainer.style.display = 'block';
    synergyFill.className = 'mcp-synergy-fill ' + synergyClass;
    synergyFill.style.width = synergy + '%';
    synergyLabel.textContent = 'SYNERGY: ' + synergy + '%';

    if (buildStack.length >= 4) {
      resultEl.innerHTML += '  |  Stack is full — remove a server to add another.';
    }
  }
}

// ===== THEME MARKETPLACE =====
const THEMES = {
  default: { primary: '#BFFF00', secondary: '#FF2E63', tertiary: '#08F7FE', name: 'DEFAULT' },
  midnight: { primary: '#6366F1', secondary: '#F59E0B', tertiary: '#8B5CF6', name: 'MIDNIGHT' },
  sunset: { primary: '#F97316', secondary: '#EC4899', tertiary: '#FBBF24', name: 'SUNSET' },
  forest: { primary: '#22C55E', secondary: '#A3E635', tertiary: '#14B8A6', name: 'FOREST' },
  ocean: { primary: '#0EA5E9', secondary: '#06B6D4', tertiary: '#3B82F6', name: 'OCEAN' },
  cyberpunk: { primary: '#F0ABFC', secondary: '#E11D48', tertiary: '#22D3EE', name: 'CYBERPUNK' }
};

let currentTheme = 'default';

function applyTheme(themeName) {
  const theme = THEMES[themeName];
  if (!theme) return;
  currentTheme = themeName;
  const root = document.documentElement.style;
  root.setProperty('--brand-primary', theme.primary);
  root.setProperty('--brand-secondary', theme.secondary);
  root.setProperty('--brand-tertiary', theme.tertiary);
  
  // Update featured theme banner
  const banner = document.getElementById('featured-theme-name');
  const dot = document.getElementById('featured-theme-dot');
  if (banner) banner.textContent = theme.name;
  if (dot) dot.style.background = theme.primary;
  
  // Save to localStorage
  localStorage.setItem('skills-theme-name', themeName);
  
  // Update theme switcher
  const switcher = document.getElementById('theme-switcher');
  if (switcher) switcher.value = themeName === 'default' ? '' : themeName;
}

function initThemeSwitcher() {
  const switcher = document.getElementById('theme-switcher');
  if (!switcher) return;
  
  // Load saved theme
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('skills-theme-name');
  if (saved && THEMES[saved]) {
    applyTheme(saved);
  }
  
  // Check URL param
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const themeParam = params.get('theme');
  if (themeParam && THEMES[themeParam.toLowerCase()]) {
    applyTheme(themeParam.toLowerCase());
  }
  
  switcher.addEventListener('change', () => {
    const val = switcher.value || 'default';
    applyTheme(val);
    showToast('THEME: ' + THEMES[val].name);
  });
  
  // Share button
  const shareBtn = document.getElementById('share-theme-btn');
  if (shareBtn) {
    shareBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const url = new URL(window.location);
      if (currentTheme !== 'default') {
        url.searchParams.set('theme', currentTheme);
      }
      url.searchParams.delete('palette');
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(url.toString()).then(() => {
        showToast('THEME URL COPIED!');
      }).catch(() => {
        showToast('COPY FAILED — TRY AGAIN');
      });
    });
  }
}

// Featured Theme Banner — rotates themes every 10s
let featuredThemeIndex = 0;
const featuredThemeOrder = ['default', 'midnight', 'cyberpunk', 'sunset', 'ocean', 'forest'];

function initFeaturedThemeBanner() {
  setInterval(() => {
    featuredThemeIndex = (featuredThemeIndex + 1) % featuredThemeOrder.length;
    const themeName = featuredThemeOrder[featuredThemeIndex];
    const theme = THEMES[themeName];
    const banner = document.getElementById('featured-theme-name');
    const dot = document.getElementById('featured-theme-dot');
    if (banner && theme) {
      banner.textContent = theme.name;
      if (dot) dot.style.background = theme.primary;
    }
  }, 10000);
}

// ===== TOAST NOTIFICATIONS =====
function showToast(message) {
  const container = document.getElementById('toast-container');
  if (!container) return;
  const toast = document.createElement('div');
  toast.className = 'toast';
  toast.textContent = message;
  container.appendChild(toast);
  setTimeout(() => {
    if (toast.parentNode) toast.parentNode.removeChild(toast);
  }, 3000);
}

// ===== COPY INSTALL COMMAND =====
function initCopyInstallCommand() {
  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const btn = e.target.closest('.card-copy-btn');
    if (!btn) return;
    e.stopPropagation();
    const skillName = btn.getAttribute('data-skill');
    const command = 'claude skill install ' + skillName;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(command).then(() => {
      showToast('COPIED: ' + command);
      btn.textContent = 'COPIED!';
      setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = '⎘ INSTALL'; }, 1500);
    }).catch(() => {
      showToast('COPY FAILED');
    });
  });
}

// ===== STACK RECOMMENDER =====
let recommenderSelection = [];

function initStackRecommender() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('recommender-skills-grid');
  const calcBtn = document.getElementById('recommender-calculate-btn');
  if (!grid || !calcBtn) return;
  
  // Populate skill chips (non-agent, non-system skills for practical recommendations)
  const recommendableSkills = SKILLS_DATA.filter(s => 
    s.category !== 'Agent Modes' && s.category !== 'System' && s.name !== 'sample-hello-skill'
  );
  
  recommendableSkills.forEach(skill => {
    const chip = document.createElement('span');
    chip.className = 'recommender-skill-chip';
    chip.textContent = skill.name;
    chip.setAttribute('data-skill', skill.name);
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => toggleRecommenderSkill(skill.name));
    grid.appendChild(chip);
  });
  
  calcBtn.addEventListener('click', calculateRecommendation);
}

function toggleRecommenderSkill(skillName) {
  const idx = recommenderSelection.indexOf(skillName);
  if (idx >= 0) {
    recommenderSelection.splice(idx, 1);
  } else {
    if (recommenderSelection.length >= 5) {
      showToast('MAX 5 SKILLS — REMOVE ONE FIRST');
      return;
    }
    recommenderSelection.push(skillName);
  }
  updateRecommenderUI();
}

function updateRecommenderUI() {
  // Update skill chips
  document.querySelectorAll('.recommender-skill-chip').forEach(chip => {
    const name = chip.getAttribute('data-skill');
    chip.classList.toggle('selected', recommenderSelection.includes(name));
  });
  
  // Update selected area
  const selected = document.getElementById('recommender-selected');
  selected.innerHTML = '';
  recommenderSelection.forEach(name => {
    const chip = document.createElement('span');
    chip.className = 'recommender-selected-chip';
    chip.textContent = name + ' \u00D7';
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const idx = recommenderSelection.indexOf(name);
      if (idx >= 0) recommenderSelection.splice(idx, 1);
      updateRecommenderUI();
    });
    selected.appendChild(chip);
  });
  
  // Enable/disable calculate button
  const calcBtn = document.getElementById('recommender-calculate-btn');
  calcBtn.disabled = recommenderSelection.length < 3;
}

function calculateRecommendation() {
  if (recommenderSelection.length < 3) return;
  
  // Collect MCP servers from selected skills
  const serverFreq = {};
  const categories = new Set();
  
  recommenderSelection.forEach(skillName => {
    const skill = SKILLS_DATA.find(s => s.name === skillName);
    if (skill) {
      categories.add(skill.category);
      (skill.mcpServers || []).forEach(server => {
        serverFreq[server] = (serverFreq[server] || 0) + 1;
      });
    }
  });
  
  // Find best matching pre-built stack
  let bestStack = null;
  let bestScore = 0;
  
  MCP_STACKS.forEach(stack => {
    let overlap = 0;
    stack.servers.forEach(server => {
      if (serverFreq[server]) overlap += serverFreq[server];
    });
    // Also check skill overlap
    let skillOverlap = 0;
    (stack.pairedSkills || []).forEach(ps => {
      if (recommenderSelection.includes(ps)) skillOverlap += 2;
    });
    const totalScore = overlap + skillOverlap;
    if (totalScore > bestScore) {
      bestScore = totalScore;
      bestStack = stack;
    }
  });
  
  // Determine best agent mode based on categories
  const categoryAgentMap = {
    'Design & UI': 'agent-dolphin',
    'Reasoning': 'agent-owl',
    'Development': 'agent-ant',
    'Content': 'agent-elephant',
    'Strategy': 'agent-eagle',
    'System': 'agent-beaver',
    'Data & Web': 'agent-beaver',
    'Creative': 'agent-dolphin',
    'MCP Servers': 'agent-ant',
    'Infrastructure': 'agent-eagle'
  };
  
  let bestAgent = 'agent-rabbit';
  let bestAgentCount = 0;
  const agentFreq = {};
  categories.forEach(cat => {
    const agent = categoryAgentMap[cat] || 'agent-rabbit';
    agentFreq[agent] = (agentFreq[agent] || 0) + 1;
    if (agentFreq[agent] > bestAgentCount) {
      bestAgentCount = agentFreq[agent];
      bestAgent = agent;
    }
  });
  
  const agentSkill = SKILLS_DATA.find(s => s.name === bestAgent);
  const agentName = agentSkill ? agentSkill.name.replace('agent-', '').charAt(0).toUpperCase() + agentSkill.name.replace('agent-', '').slice(1) : 'Rabbit';
  const agentPower = agentSkill ? agentSkill.description.split('—')[0].trim() : 'Multiply Ideas';
  const agentMcpStack = agentSkill ? (document.querySelector(`.agent-mode-card[data-skill="${bestAgent}"]`)?.getAttribute('data-mcp-stack') || 'AI Research Lab') : 'AI Research Lab';
  
  // Calculate compatibility score
  const maxPossible = recommenderSelection.length * 3;
  const compatScore = Math.min(98, Math.round((bestScore / maxPossible) * 80 + 15));
  
  // Infrastructure recommendations based on selected skills
  const devCount = recommenderSelection.filter(name => {
    const s = SKILLS_DATA.find(sk => sk.name === name);
    return s && s.category === 'Development';
  }).length;
  const dataCount = recommenderSelection.filter(name => {
    const s = SKILLS_DATA.find(sk => sk.name === name);
    return s && s.category === 'Data & Web';
  }).length;
  const sysCount = recommenderSelection.filter(name => {
    const s = SKILLS_DATA.find(sk => sk.name === name);
    return s && s.category === 'System';
  }).length;
  const stratCount = recommenderSelection.filter(name => {
    const s = SKILLS_DATA.find(sk => sk.name === name);
    return s && s.category === 'Strategy';
  }).length;

  let infraRecommendations = [];
  if (devCount >= 3) {
    infraRecommendations.push('9router-gateway + 4cli-unified — heavy Development usage benefits from unified CLI routing');
  }
  if (dataCount >= 2) {
    infraRecommendations.push('owl-proxy-defense — Data & Web skills need robust proxy defense for scraping');
  }
  if (sysCount >= 2) {
    infraRecommendations.push('secret-vault — System skills require centralized credential management');
  }
  if (stratCount >= 1 && devCount >= 1) {
    infraRecommendations.push('triune-proxy-stack — Strategy + Development combo needs maximum redundancy');
  }

  // Render result
  const resultEl = document.getElementById('recommender-result');
  resultEl.style.display = 'block';
  
  resultEl.innerHTML = `
    <div class="recommender-result-title">YOUR OPTIMAL STACK</div>
    <div class="recommender-result-item"><strong>MCP STACK:</strong> ${bestStack ? bestStack.name : 'Full-Stack Web Studio'} <span class="result-badge">${bestStack ? bestStack.synergy + '% synergy' : '96% synergy'}</span></div>
    <div class="recommender-result-item"><strong>SERVERS:</strong> ${bestStack ? bestStack.servers.join(', ') : 'filesystem, github, docker, fetch'}</div>
    <div class="recommender-result-item"><strong>AGENT MODE:</strong> ${agentName} — ${agentPower} <span class="result-badge">${agentMcpStack}</span></div>
    <div class="recommender-result-item"><strong>COMPATIBILITY:</strong> ${compatScore}% — based on ${recommenderSelection.length} skills across ${categories.size} categories</div>
    ${infraRecommendations.length > 0 ? infraRecommendations.map(r => `<div class="recommender-result-item" style="border-left-color:#FF8C00"><strong>INFRA PAIRING:</strong> ${r}</div>`).join('') : ''}
    ${bestStack && bestStack.warnings && bestStack.warnings.length > 0 ? bestStack.warnings.map(w => `<div class="recommender-result-item" style="border-left-color:#FF4444"><strong>NOTE:</strong> ${w}</div>`).join('') : ''}
  `;
  
  // Animate result
  if (typeof gsap !== 'undefined') {
    gsap.fromTo(resultEl, { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'back.out(1.5)' });
  }
}

// ===== INFRASTRUCTURE SECTION RENDERER =====
function initInfraSection() {
  // Render architecture diagram
  const archEl = document.getElementById('infra-architecture');
  if (archEl) {
    const diagram = `┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              UNIFIED STACK: 9Router + OWL + 4-CLI    │
│                                                      │
│  ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐      │
│  │ OWL Agent │◄──►│ 9Router  │◄──►│Antigrav. │      │
│  │(Skills +  │    │ Gateway  │    │  Proxy   │      │
│  │Protocols) │    │  :20128  │    │  :3000   │      │
│  └─────┬─────┘    └────┬─────┘    └──────────┘      │
│        │               │                             │
│   ┌────┴────┬──────────┼────────┬────────┐         │
│   ↓         ↓          ↓        ↓        ↓         │
│ Gemini    Claude     Codex   OpenCode  Ollama       │
│ (T0 Free) (T1)       (T2)    (T3)     (T4 Local)  │
│                                                      │
│  Protocol Stack: http/1.1 → h2 → ja3 → ws → browser│
│  Proxy Stack: Tier 1-5 with auto-rotate             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘`;
    archEl.textContent = diagram;
  }

  // Render tier cards
  const tiersEl = document.getElementById('infra-tiers');
  if (tiersEl) {
    const tiers = [
      { label: 'T0', provider: 'Gemini', cost: 'FREE', quota: '60/min 1000/day', status: 'status-green' },
      { label: 'T1', provider: 'Claude Code', cost: '$20/mo', quota: 'Unlimited', status: 'status-blue' },
      { label: 'T2', provider: 'Codex CLI', cost: '$20/mo', quota: 'ChatGPT Plus', status: 'status-yellow' },
      { label: 'T3', provider: 'OpenCode', cost: '$20/mo', quota: 'Plugin ecosystem', status: 'status-pink' },
      { label: 'T4', provider: 'Ollama', cost: 'LOCAL', quota: 'Unlimited (quality trade-off)', status: 'status-orange' }
    ];

    tiersEl.innerHTML = tiers.map(t => `
      <div class="infra-tier-card">
        <div class="infra-tier-label">${t.label}</div>
        <div class="infra-tier-provider"><span class="infra-tier-status ${t.status}"></span>${t.provider}</div>
        <div class="infra-tier-cost">${t.cost} · ${t.quota}</div>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  }
}
</script>

<script>
// ===== TASTE SKILL SCROLL REVEAL =====
(function() {
  const revealElements = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-content, .stats-dashboard, .filter-section, .section-heading, .agent-spotlight-heading, .agent-modes-row, .blueprints-heading, .blueprints-findings, .blueprint-cards, .pipeline-cards, .playbook-cards, .mcp-curator-heading, .mcp-stacks-grid, .mcp-build-section, .stack-recommender-heading, .recommender-panel, .infra-heading, .infra-architecture, .infra-tiers, .api-notice, .footer, .featured-theme-banner');
  revealElements.forEach(el => el.classList.add('reveal'));

  const staggerElements = document.querySelectorAll('.stats-row, .agent-modes-row, .infra-tiers');
  staggerElements.forEach(el => { el.classList.add('reveal-stagger'); });

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-stagger').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // Also observe skill cards as they're added
  const gridObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('skill-card:not(.reveal)').forEach(card => {
      card.classList.add('reveal');
      observer.observe(card);
    });
  });
  const grid = document.getElementById('skills-grid');
  if (grid) gridObserver.observe(grid, { childList: true });
})();
</script>


</body></html>
